mapper.select:
SELECT H.HISTORY_ID AS historyId, H.HISTORY_TYPE AS historyType, H.INBOUND_ID AS inboundId, H.OUTBOUND_ID AS outboundId, H.BEFORE_QUANTITY AS beforeQuantity, H.CHANGE_QUANTITY AS changeQuantity, H.AFTER_QUANTITY AS afterQuantity, H.ITEM_ID AS itemId, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, H.WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, H.PROCESS_USER_ID AS processUserId, U.NAME AS processUserName, H.REMARK AS remark, H.CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM STOCK_HISTORIES H JOIN ITEMS I ON H.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON H.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON H.PROCESS_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND ( I.ITEM_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR I.ITEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR W.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND H.HISTORY_TYPE = #{historyType}
ORDER BY H.HISTORY_ID DESC
